_comment: HeishaHub — Grafana Overview (Skeleton v0.1). Import via Grafana UI oder API. Datasource-UID muss vor Import auf den lokalen InfluxDB-Bucket angepasst werden.

targets.query: from(bucket: "heishahub") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "panasonic_heat_pump" and r.field =~ /outside_temperature|inlet_temperature|outlet_temperature|discharge_temperature/)
from(bucket: "heishahub") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.field =~ /compressor_frequency|water_flow|fan_motor_speed/)

title: HeishaHub — Overview
